completion_summary: Diagnosed PPO non-completion as a non-Markov public progress omission plus categorical-mode evaluation collapse. Added public per-experiment core-progress observation bits, reward contract 0.3 one-shot public-stage shaping, regression coverage, and a bounded 25600-step partition probe. Fixed-seed stochastic evaluation was byte-replayable and materially functional, but the unchanged deterministic formal gate remained nonfunctional; formal switching/retraining is deferred until the SAC-owned shared runner is handed back. Invalidated all old PPO checkpoints, regenerated fail-closed method-freeze evidence at 26 blockers, updated todo, and pushed commit 72ea131 to main. No Bench, reference-search, LLM, docs, or site access.
scope: Diagnose PPO procedural non-completion, introduce public-contract stage-progress shaping without hidden-state leakage, and validate on bounded missing-task probes before any formal retraining.
